input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation commonly demonstrates YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON config files, but those formats require separate hoplite-* modules; tests for hoplite-core alone should use MapPropertySource or .properties-style sources unless the workflow intentionally adds a format module.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves with only Kotlin/coroutines runtime dependencies and can be exercised meaningfully with its built-in ConfigLoader, decoders, MapPropertySource, SystemPropertiesPropertySource, EnvironmentVariablesPropertySource, and bundled Java properties parser; no Docker image, extra Maven dependency, or required environment/system property is needed before generation.
